---
title: "Manual Overview"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Manual Overview}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

# DPmixGPD User Manual

Welcome to the DPmixGPD user manual. This section provides comprehensive documentation for using the package effectively.

## Getting Started

Begin here if you're new to DPmixGPD:

- [**Introduction**](introduction.html) - Quick start guide with basic examples to get you up and running

## User Guide

Detailed documentation organized by topic:

### Core Concepts

- [**Available Distributions**](distributions.html) - Overview of supported mixture kernels (Normal, Lognormal, Gamma, etc.) and their properties

- [**Model Specification**](model-spec.html) - How to specify models, set priors, and configure parameters

- [**MCMC Workflow**](mcmc-workflow.html) - Running MCMC chains, convergence diagnostics, and best practices

### Model Types

- [**Unconditional Models**](unconditional.html) - Density estimation without covariates for univariate data

- [**Conditional Models**](conditional.html) - Covariate-dependent density estimation using parameter linking

- [**Causal Inference**](causal.html) - Treatment effect estimation with propensity score adjustment

### Advanced Topics

- [**Backends (CRP vs SB)**](backends.html) - Comparing Chinese Restaurant Process and Stick-Breaking inference approaches

- [**S3 Methods Reference**](reference-s3.html) - Complete guide to using `print()`, `summary()`, `plot()`, `predict()`, and other S3 methods

## How to Use This Manual

1. **New users**: Start with the [Introduction](introduction.html) for a quick overview
2. **Building models**: Read [Model Specification](model-spec.html) and [MCMC Workflow](mcmc-workflow.html)
3. **Specific use cases**: Jump to [Unconditional](unconditional.html), [Conditional](conditional.html), or [Causal](causal.html) based on your needs
4. **API details**: See [S3 Methods Reference](reference-s3.html) for comprehensive method documentation
